flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Cerro Coso Community College are 17% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($35.0k vs $42.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Cerro Coso Community College fell 56% between 2021 and 2024 (62.7% → 27.4%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cerro Coso Community College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.3k → $11.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cerro Coso Community College fell 12% between 2007 and 2010 (18.6% → 16.4%).
